failures.description: The ProductCatalogSearch invocation was malformed: it omitted required item_id and used product_id as integer 0 instead of the provided string product_id "1762337868".
failures.checklist_reasoning: The agent had the required item_id and product_id at index 1, and the tool schema at index 2 required both as strings. At index 2 it prepared an invalid call with only product_id set to numeric 0, omitting item_id and altering product_id. The tool then explicitly rejected this malformed payload at index 3 with a SchemaError.
